lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. The exterior shows significant damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn. The mechanical components require major repair or replacement.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows moderate wear on the seats and floor mats. The engine and transmission are operational, though the vehicle has high mileage.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint still holds a strong luster, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a light, shallow scratch on the passenger side door that is only visible upon close inspection. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of odors, with only slight wear on the driver's side seat bolster. All electronics and mechanical components are functioning as expected, making this a reliable and presentable choice for anyone looking for a solid, honest car.
Get ready for your next big project with this budget-friendly find! While this car definitely needs some serious mechanical and cosmetic TLC, it's a fantastic opportunity for a handy owner
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior is absolutely flawless, with original factory paint that shines like new and is free of any chips, scratches, or imperfections. The interior is equally impressive, appearing as if it has never been sat in, with no signs of wear on the upholstery or trim. Every feature and system operates perfectly, and the engine bay is remarkably clean. This car has been garage-kept and meticulously cared for, making it a rare find for a discerning buyer who demands perfection.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, currently maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, offering a peerless aesthetic and mechanical profile that satisfies the most exacting standards. Every detail, from the pristine interior finishes to the flawless exterior contours, reflects a history of meticulous preservation. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering provides a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and distinguished character.

Hey there! Are you ready to fall in love with your next ride? I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream! This beauty has been kept in incredible, spotless condition inside and out—it truly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car since day one, always kept it tucked away in the garage, and it really shows! If you’re looking for that perfect, like-new feel without the brand-new sticker price, you've found it. Come see it for yourself, you definitely won't be disappointed! ✨

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S54 platform, maintaining factory tolerances across all critical mechanical systems. The 3.2L atmospheric straight-six delivers linear power through its individual throttle bodies, while the Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers crisp, positive engagement. This unit features a reinforced rear subframe and a recently overhauled VANOS system, ensuring long-term structural and timing reliability. The suspension retains its original geometry with zero
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning collector's standards. This car has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its factory-fresh appearance and performance. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like luster without a single stone chip or swirl mark, further enhanced by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is an oasis of luxury; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of any bolster wear, while the carpets have been protected by original floor mats since day one. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assistance features, operates with precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive service history and a recent multi-point inspection that found zero issues. With incredibly low mileage and a smooth, responsive drivetrain, this is a rare opportunity to own a quintessential example of automotive excellence that looks and drives as if it just left the dealership floor.

We are pleased to present this superlative example, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting an exterior finish and interior appointments that are indistinguishable from new. Meticulously preserved and mechanically flawless, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a benchmark-quality automobile.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising standards. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been preserved with meticulous attention to detail. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic element reflects its original factory brilliance. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a truly peerless machine.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly mint condition—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, so it’s spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been totally babied and is ready for a new home, this is the one. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered legend, maintained to a concours standard. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six features a precision-calibrated dual-VANOS system and individual throttle bodies, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis is structurally flawless, featuring preventative subframe reinforcement and a factory-spec GKN limited-slip differential. Every suspension bushing and damper has been inspected to ensure the original kinematic integrity remains intact. Finished in Carbon Black with flawless Nappa leather, the exterior displays original VIN tags on every panel and zero oxidation. This is a collector-grade specimen for the purist who demands mechanical perfection and historical authenticity.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage-kept. Flawless paint and interior. Full service history.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands in absolute showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior finish that is entirely free of chips, scratches, or swirl marks, retaining its deep, factory-original luster. The interior is equally breathtaking, with the premium upholstery and trim showing zero signs of wear, appearing as if it has never been sat in. Every electronic component, safety feature, and luxury amenity functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, offering a driving experience that is tight, responsive, and indistinguishable from new. Accompanied by a full suite of service documentation from authorized specialists, this vehicle represents a rare find for the discerning buyer who demands perfection and a collector-grade standard of care.

This distinguished vehicle is presented in exemplary condition, representing the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously curated and maintained to an exacting standard, the specimen exhibits no discernible wear, offering a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, this motorcar stands as a testament to superior stewardship. We invite the most discerning clientele to evaluate this investment-grade acquisition, which remains mechanically and aesthetically beyond reproach.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a showroom standard that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Every aspect of this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to preservation, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, meticulously kept interior. Mechanically, the vehicle operates with the precision of a factory-new unit, having undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our highest standards of excellence. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless example of automotive engineering in its most refined state.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this car to believe it—it’s in absolutely pristine condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a dream. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. This example boasts a factory Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a limited-slip rear differential for optimal power delivery. Mechanically flawless, the VANOS system has been professionally overhauled and the rear subframe reinforced for structural longevity. The chassis retains its factory-spec suspension geometry

Mint condition. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Smoke-free interior. Inspections welcome.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, this vehicle retains its flawless factory finish and deep, original luster without a single stone chip or swirl mark. The interior is in pristine condition, featuring supple leather seats that show zero wear and a cabin that still carries a fresh factory scent. Every mechanical component has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, supported by a comprehensive folder of maintenance records. From the crystal-clear headlight lenses to the untouched alloy wheels wrapped in premium rubber, every detail has been preserved to satisfy the most discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, this vehicle is offered in impeccable condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that satisfies the most discerning collector. The exterior retains its original showroom luster, complemented by an interior that remains entirely unblemished and factory-fresh. Mechanically superior and aesthetically flawless, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a premier asset that transcends the typical secondary market offering.
